title: Frontend integration: surface 6 hidden backend analytics in stock page, dashboard, and screener

observation.gap_identified: Backend sends volatility_analytics, dividend_intelligence, survival_crash_timing, bubble_indicator, chart_patterns per stock but frontend didn't type or render any of them. Cross-asset dashboard (macro regime quadrant, RORO score, momentum table, intermarket divergences) had API endpoint but was never called from dashboard. Screener had signal_components in API response but only showed composite score — no per-component breakdown visible.

implementation.feature_built: 1) Stock detail page: added Volatility Analytics card (GARCH forecast, HV 20/60D, IV-HV spread, vol regime), Dividend Intelligence card (yield, payout ratio, growth, safety score, ex-date), Survival Crash Timing card (Cox PH 3m/6m/12m with progress bars), Bubble Indicator card (Sornette LPPL status + confidence bar), Chart Patterns card (detected patterns with bias and support/resistance). 2) Dashboard: added full Cross-Asset Macro Regime section with 3 summary cards (Growth×Inflation quadrant, Risk-On/Off score, Market Weather), intermarket divergence alerts, and cross-asset momentum table (12 assets). 3) Screener: click-to-expand rows showing signal component breakdown (12+ components sorted by magnitude), factor style, alpha, dividend yield, pattern bias. Double-click navigates to full analysis.

limitations: No new backend logic — purely frontend display integration
Cross-asset dashboard data requires network calls to FRED/yfinance which adds ~3s to initial dashboard load
Screener expandable rows use click vs double-click which may not be intuitive on mobile
Volatility analytics card only shows data when GARCH model converges for the ticker
assessment.self_critique: Could have added loading skeletons for the cross-asset dashboard section. Could have cached the cross-asset data more aggressively. The screener expansion could use a dedicated expand icon rather than relying on click/double-click distinction.

next_steps: Add loading skeletons for cross-asset dashboard while data fetches
Add dedicated expand/collapse icon to screener rows for better UX
Surface the cross-asset correlation matrix as a visual heatmap component
Add volatility cone chart (vol cone from vol_analytics.vol_cone data) to stock page
Wire crash_timeline (60-month forward probability curve) into a chart on the outlook page
